about_gameP1: Endless Ragnarok is the major expansion DLC for Granblue Fantasy: Relink, the acclaimed action RPG by Cygames. It continues the skyfaring adventure with a new story arc featuring the mysterious Ragnalia, the Herald of Doom, Beelzebub, and The World.
about_source_2: Official Granblue Fantasy Relink Discord community reports
about_source_3: Cygames official updates and patch notes
about_source_4: Community-submitted tier lists and build strategy discussions
about_wikiP1: Endless Ragnarok Wiki is a community-driven resource dedicated to helping players of the Granblue Fantasy: Relink expansion. Our goal is to provide accurate, up-to-date information on characters, the Conflux, Master Traits, Weapon Transcendence, Sigils, summons, and boss strategies.
about_wikiP2: This wiki is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cygames. All game assets, names, and trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
content_fallbackNotice: This article is currently shown in English.
hero_subtitle: Complete Guide — Characters, Conflux, Master Traits, Weapon Transcendence & Tier Lists
home_about_p1: Endless Ragnarok is the major expansion DLC for Granblue Fantasy: Relink, the acclaimed action RPG by Cygames. It continues the skyfaring adventure with a new story arc featuring the mysterious Ragnalia, the Herald of Doom, Beelzebub, and The World. The expansion introduces the Conflux roguelite mode, a new Summon system, Master Traits to customize characters beyond Level 100, Weapon Transcendence, and 6 new playable characters.
home_about_p2: Whether you're mastering the Conflux roguelite mode, optimizing your Master Trait builds, or taking on Chaos-tier boss encounters, every decision determines your success. With 28 playable characters, full cross-platform co-op, and deep customization systems, there's always a new strategy to master.
home_cta_description: From Conflux strategies to Chaos-tier boss tips, our guides cover everything you need to conquer the skies.
home_feature_conflux_desc: New solo roguelite mode with randomized rooms, power-up choices, and escalating difficulty across multiple depths.
home_feature_summon_desc: Lyria can now summon powerful primal beasts in combat, with controllable summons and devastating Primal Burst combos.
home_feature_masterTraits_desc: Three new trait styles per character — Insight, Essence, and Crux — unlocked at Level 100 for deep customization.
home_feature_crossplay_desc: 4-player online co-op across PS5, PS4, Switch 2, and PC with full crossplay support.
home_hero_description: The massive expansion for Granblue Fantasy: Relink. Battle through the Conflux roguelite mode, summon primal beasts, master new traits, and take on Chaos-tier quests across all platforms with crossplay.
home_module_beginner_desc: How to unlock the expansion, prerequisite quests, first steps in the new story, and key tips for new and returning players.
home_module_conflux_desc: Room types, power-up strategies, Resonance point management, and how to maximize your material farming per run.
home_module_tierlist_desc: Rankings of all 28 playable characters including the 6 new DLC additions. Based on damage output, utility, survivability, and Chaos-tier performance.
home_module_masterTraits_desc: Three Master Trait Styles — Insight, Essence, and Crux — unlocked at Level 100. Learn which path suits each character.
home_module_characters_desc: Detailed breakdowns of all 6 new playable characters: Beatrix, Eustace, Fraux, Fediel, Gallanza, and Maglielle.
home_module_weapons_desc: Upgrade fully enhanced weapons beyond their limits. Unlock swappable traits, Slot EX rewards, and aesthetic effects.
home_module_summons_desc: Lyria can now summon powerful primal beasts in combat. Learn controllable summons, Primal Bursts, and optimal setups.
home_module_sigils_desc: Find the best Sigils and traits for every character. New expansion Sigils, best-in-slot recommendations, and farming strategies.
home_module_bosses_desc: Strategies for every major boss including the Ragnalia Heralds, Beelzebub, The World, and Chaos-tier encounters.
home_module_coop_desc: 4-player online co-op with full cross-platform play across PS5, PS4, Switch 2, and PC.
home_module_story_desc: Step-by-step story walkthrough for the Endless Ragnarok expansion featuring the Ragnalia and Beelzebub.
home_module_endgame_desc: Optimize your endgame farming with strategies for Fatebreaker quests, Chaos-tier content, and material collection.
home_module_builds_desc: Detailed build guides for every character including best Sigils, Master Trait paths, weapon choices, and skill rotations.
home_modules_subtitle: Pick the module that matches what you need right now: starter basics, meta characters, Conflux strategies, or boss tips.
home_start_1_desc: Everything you need to know before starting Endless Ragnarok, from unlocking the expansion to your first steps.
home_start_2_desc: Master the new roguelite solo mode with strategies for every room type and power-up choice.
home_start_3_desc: Find the best characters in Endless Ragnarok with our ranked tier list including the 6 new DLC characters.
home_start_4_desc: Understand the Insight, Essence, and Crux paths for every character to push them beyond their limits.
home_start_5_desc: Learn how to transcend weapons, unlock swappable traits, and get the best builds for each weapon type.
home_start_subtitle: Follow these steps to get started with Endless Ragnarok and make the most of the expansion.

page_home_description: Complete Endless Ragnarok wiki with 28 characters, Conflux guide, Master Traits, Weapon Transcendence, best Sigils, tier lists and tips for Relink expansion.
page_guides_description: Complete Endless Ragnarok strategy guides — beginner tips, character builds, Conflux strategies, boss tips, and more. Updated regularly.
site_description: The ultimate Endless Ragnarok wiki — character tier lists, Conflux guide, Master Traits, Weapon Transcendence, Sigils, summons, boss strategies, and co-op tips. Updated regularly.
site_title: Endless Ragnarok Wiki — Characters, Conflux, Builds
section_guides_desc: Complete guides for Endless Ragnarok covering characters, Conflux strategies, Master Traits, builds, and more.
tierList_intro: Our Endless Ragnarok tier list ranks all 28 characters based on damage output, utility, survivability, and performance in Chaos-tier content.
tierList_faq_1: How often is the tier list updated?
tierList_faq_1_answer: We update the tier list after every major patch and balance change. Minor adjustments are made weekly based on community feedback.
tierList_faq_2_answer: Sandalphon earns SS tier due to his Supreme Primarch Mode providing massive damage buffs with an easy skill rotation, making him effective in all content.
tierList_faq_3_answer: Not at all. Lower-tier characters can excel in specific niches or with the right Master Trait builds. Tier rankings reflect overall power, not absolute usefulness.
tierList_faq_4_answer: The meta shifts with each major update from Cygames. Check our Discord for the latest meta discussion.
faq_howToStart: How do I start Endless Ragnarok?
faq_howToStart_answer: Complete the Proud Quest 'The Tale of Bahamut's Rage' to unlock the Epilogue, then speak with Rolan and Historiath to begin the Endless Ragnarok story.
faq_bestCharacter: Who is the best character in Endless Ragnarok?
faq_bestCharacter_answer: Sandalphon is currently SS tier with Supreme Primarch Mode providing high DPS and easy skill rotation. Cagliostro, Charlotta, and Narmaya are also top picks in S tier.
faq_whatIsConflux_answer: The Conflux is a new roguelite solo mode in Endless Ragnarok. You enter via gateways in Seedhollow or Tredame Sanctum, choose power-ups before each area, and battle through randomized rooms with escalating difficulty and greater rewards at deeper depths.
faq_howToUnlockMasterTraits: How do I unlock Master Traits?
faq_howToUnlockMasterTraits_answer: Master Traits unlock at Level 100 for all 28 characters. Each character has three Master Trait Styles — Insight, Essence, and Crux — offering different combat specializations.
faq_whatIsWeaponTranscendence_answer: Weapon Transcendence lets you upgrade fully enhanced weapons beyond their original limits. You unlock swappable traits, Slot EX rewards, and special aesthetic effects. Materials come from Fatebreaker quests and the Conflux.
faq_bestSummons: What are the best summons in Endless Ragnarok?
faq_bestSummons_answer: Lucilius and Rolan are the two controllable summons that deal massive damage. For passive bonuses, choose summons that complement your character's build and the quest type.
faq_crossplay_answer: Yes, full crossplay is enabled across all platforms — PS5, PS4, Switch 2, and PC. Each player brings their own set of 4 summons, but only 1 can be fielded at a time per party.
faq_chaosDifficulty_answer: Chaos is the hardest quest tier in Endless Ragnarok, featuring enemies that can one-hit weaker characters. It requires fully built characters with optimized Sigils, Master Traits, and summons.
faq_bestBuilds: Where can I find character builds?
faq_bestBuilds_answer: Check our Builds section for detailed build guides for all 28 characters, including best Sigils, Master Trait paths, weapon choices, and skill rotations.
faq_howToGetStrong: How do I get strong fast in Endless Ragnarok?
faq_howToGetStrong_answer: Focus on getting characters to Level 100 first, then run the Conflux repeatedly for enhancement materials. Equip the best available Sigils and unlock Master Traits for your main characters.
privacyPolicy_changes_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date.
privacyPolicy_children_p1: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacyPolicy_contact_p1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can reach us through the community Discord server.
privacyPolicy_intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Endless Ragnarok Wiki collects, uses, and protects information when you visit our website at endlessragnarokwiki.wiki.
termsOfService_intro: By accessing and using Endless Ragnarok Wiki (endlessragnarokwiki.wiki), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_p1: When you visit Endless Ragnarok Wiki, we automatically collect certain technical information to ensure the website functions properly and to improve your experience.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_auto: Automatically collected data includes browser type, device type, operating system, screen resolution, and referring URL.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_cookies: Cookies and similar tracking technologies are used to remember your preferences (such as dark/light theme), serve relevant ads, and analyze site traffic.
privacyPolicy_infoCollect_noPersonal: We do not collect personal identification information — no names, email addresses, or account details are gathered through this website.
privacyPolicy_howUse_p1: The information we collect is used solely to operate and improve the Endless Ragnarok Wiki website. We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your information to outside parties.
privacyPolicy_howUse_analytics: Analytics: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our content, which pages are most popular, and how to improve navigation.
privacyPolicy_howUse_performance: Performance: Technical data helps us identify and resolve site issues, optimize loading times, and ensure compatibility across devices.
privacyPolicy_howUse_preferences: Preferences: Cookie data allows us to remember your theme selection and display settings for a consistent experience across visits.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_p1: Endless Ragnarok Wiki integrates with a limited number of third-party services. These services may collect information as described in their own privacy policies.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_ga: Google Analytics: Collects anonymized usage data to help us understand site traffic and visitor behavior.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_steam: Steam: Our site links to the official Granblue Fantasy: Relink Steam page. Steam's own privacy policy governs any data collected through their platform.
privacyPolicy_thirdParty_discord: Discord: Our community Discord server is operated separately. Discord's privacy policy applies to any data collected within the server.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_p1: As a visitor to Endless Ragnarok Wiki, you have certain rights regarding the limited data collected about your browsing activity.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_optOut: Opt out of Google Analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics opt-out browser add-on.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_cookies: Manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect site functionality.
privacyPolicy_dataRights_contact: Contact us through our community Discord if you have concerns about data collection or wish to request deletion of any identifiable data.
privacyPolicy_security_p1: We implement standard technical measures to protect the limited data collected through this website. However, no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
termsOfService_aboutSite_p1: Endless Ragnarok Wiki is an unofficial, fan-made community resource for the Granblue Fantasy: Relink expansion. We provide guides, tier lists, character builds, and strategy content created by and for the player community.
termsOfService_aboutSite_p2: This wiki is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Cygames. All game content, names, assets, and trademarks referenced on this site are the property of their respective owners.
termsOfService_changes_p1: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
termsOfService_contact_p1: For questions about these Terms of Service, please reach out through our community Discord server. We will respond to legitimate inquiries as promptly as possible.
termsOfService_disclaimer_p1: The content on Endless Ragnarok Wiki is provided "as is" and without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any information on this site.
termsOfService_disclaimer_p2: Endless Ragnarok Wiki is a fan project and is not responsible for any in-game changes, updates, or decisions made by Cygames regarding Granblue Fantasy: Relink or the Endless Ragnarok expansion.
termsOfService_disclaimer_p3: Any reliance you place on information from this wiki is at your own risk. We are not liable for any losses or damages arising from the use of content found on this website.
termsOfService_ip_p1: All game-related content, including but not limited to character names, artwork, music, and lore referenced on Endless Ragnarok Wiki, is the intellectual property of Cygames and its respective licensors.
termsOfService_ip_p2: Our original editorial content, guides, and analyses are created by community contributors. You may share links to our content but may not reproduce, republish, or redistribute our original content without permission.
termsOfService_limitation_p1: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, Endless Ragnarok Wiki and its contributors shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of this website.
termsOfService_links_p1: This website contains links to third-party sites such as Steam, Discord, and YouTube. We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any linked third-party sites. Accessing external links is at your own risk.
termsOfService_use_notAllowed_interfere: Interfering with the website's functionality, servers, or infrastructure in any way.
termsOfService_use_notAllowed_misuse: Misrepresenting the source or ownership of content found on this wiki.
termsOfService_use_notAllowed_reproduce: Reproducing, republishing, or redistributing our original content on other platforms without written permission.
termsOfService_use_notAllowed_scrape: Using automated scripts, bots, or scrapers to extract data from this website at scale.
termsOfService_use_p1: You may use Endless Ragnarok Wiki for personal, non-commercial purposes. The following guidelines outline acceptable and prohibited uses of this website.
termsOfService_use_personal: Using the wiki for personal gameplay reference and learning.
termsOfService_use_read: Reading and browsing all guides, tier lists, and strategy content.
termsOfService_use_share: Sharing links to our content with friends and community members.

category_feature_bosses_html:
BossTypeWeaknessDifficulty
BeelzebubHerald of DoomFire / Light★★★★
The WorldFinal BossVaries★★★★★
RagnaliaHerald of DoomWind★★★★★
category_bosses_overview: The Endless Ragnarok expansion introduces powerful new boss encounters including the Heralds of Doom — Beelzebub and Ragnalia — and the final boss The World. Chaos-tier boss quests represent the hardest content in the game, requiring fully built characters with optimized Sigils, Master Traits, and summons. Each boss has unique attack patterns, elemental weaknesses, and phase transitions that demand precise dodging and skill timing.
category_bosses_quicktips_1: Learn each boss's telegraph animations — every major attack has a visual wind-up that signals when to dodge.
category_bosses_quicktips_2: Bring elemental advantage: Fire and Light characters excel against Beelzebub, while Wind is effective against Ragnalia.
category_bosses_quicktips_3: In Chaos difficulty, a single hit can down undergeared characters. Prioritize HP and defense Sigils alongside damage.
category_bosses_faq_1: What is the hardest boss in Endless Ragnarok?
category_bosses_faq_1_answer: The World is considered the hardest boss, featuring multiple phases with devastating AoE attacks and strict DPS checks. Ragnalia at maximum depth in the Conflux is a close second.
category_bosses_faq_2: Do I need a full team for Chaos bosses?
category_bosses_faq_2_answer: Yes, Chaos-tier bosses are designed for 4-player co-op. Each player should bring their best built character and complementary summons.
category_bosses_faq_3_answer: Story bosses can be fought solo, but Chaos-tier and Fatebreaker bosses require co-op parties and will scale up in difficulty without a full team.
category_feature_builds_html:
CharacterBuild ArchetypeBest Master TraitKey Sigil
SandalphonDPS NukerCruxSupreme Primarch's Wrath
CagliostroBuffer / HealerEssenceAlchemist's Insight
BeatrixBurst DPSCruxDelta Clock Mastery
category_builds_overview: Character builds in Endless Ragnarok revolve around three pillars: Master Trait selection (Insight, Essence, or Crux), Sigil loadout, and weapon choice. Each of the 28 playable characters has a preferred build archetype that maximizes their unique kit. The expansion's new systems — Master Traits, Weapon Transcendence, and the enhanced Sigil pool — add significant depth to build customization, allowing characters to specialize in DPS, support, tanking, or hybrid roles.
category_builds_quicktips_1: Always match your Master Trait path to your build goal: Crux for pure DPS, Essence for support/utility, Insight for balanced play.
category_builds_quicktips_2: Prioritize getting your main character to Level 100 and unlocking their Master Trait before optimizing secondary characters.
category_builds_quicktips_3: Test builds in the Conflux before committing to expensive Sigil upgrades — the roguelite mode lets you experiment freely.
category_builds_faq_1: What is the best build archetype?
category_builds_faq_1_answer: There is no single best archetype — it depends on the character and content. DPS nukers (Crux) dominate solo, while buffers (Essence) are essential for Chaos-tier co-op.
category_builds_faq_2: Should I focus on one character or build multiple?
category_builds_faq_2_answer: Build one main character first for co-op access, then diversify. Having 2-3 well-built characters lets you adapt to different quest requirements.
category_builds_faq_3: How do I optimize a character build?
category_builds_faq_3_answer: Start with the recommended build in our character guide, then fine-tune Sigils and Master Trait choices based on the specific content you're running.

CharacterTypeWeaponUnlock

category_characters_overview: Endless Ragnarok adds 6 new DLC characters to the roster of 28 total playable characters from Granblue Fantasy: Relink. The new additions — Beatrix, Eustace, Fraux, Fediel, Gallanza, and Maglielle — each bring unique weapons, skill sets, and Master Trait specializations. All 28 characters can reach Level 100 and unlock Master Trait paths, enabling deep customization far beyond the base game's skill system.
category_characters_quicktips_1: New DLC characters unlock through the expansion story — progress the main quest to recruit each one.
category_characters_quicktips_2: Every character can be viable with the right Master Trait build and Sigil loadout. Tier lists reflect overall power, not absolute usefulness.
category_characters_quicktips_3: Check each character's dedicated guide for recommended builds, best Master Trait paths, and optimal Sigil setups.
category_characters_faq_1: How do I unlock the new DLC characters?
category_characters_faq_1_answer: The 6 new characters unlock progressively as you advance through the Endless Ragnarok story. Each character joins after completing their respective story chapter.
category_characters_faq_2: Can I use base game characters in the expansion?
category_characters_faq_2_answer: Yes, all 22 base game characters are fully playable in the expansion content. Their Master Traits and Weapon Transcendence apply to all content.
category_characters_faq_3: Which new character should I build first?
category_characters_faq_3_answer: Beatrix is a strong DPS pick for most content, while Maglielle offers excellent support utility for co-op. Choose based on your preferred playstyle.
category_feature_coop_html:
FeatureDetails
Max Players4 per party
CrossplayPS5 / PS4 / Switch 2 / PC
Summons per Player4 (1 fielded at a time)
MatchmakingPublic / Private / Friends
category_coop_overview: Endless Ragnarok features full cross-platform co-op for up to 4 players across PS5, PS4, Switch 2, and PC. All co-op quests support crossplay with no restrictions. Each player brings their own set of 4 summons, but only one summon can be fielded per party at any time. Communication through quick chat signals and understanding team composition is key to clearing Chaos-tier and Fatebreaker content.
category_coop_quicktips_1: Use the in-game quick chat to signal attacks, heals, and summon usage — voice chat is not required for success.
category_coop_quicktips_2: Diversify party roles: a team of 4 DPS characters will struggle in Chaos content. Bring at least one buffer or healer.
category_coop_quicktips_3: Each player's summon is independent — coordinate with your team to avoid wasting summon gauge on overlapping calls.
category_coop_faq_1: Is crossplay available for all content?
category_coop_faq_1_answer: Yes, full crossplay is enabled for all co-op content in Endless Ragnarok. All platforms play together seamlessly.
category_coop_faq_2: Can I play co-op solo with AI companions?
category_coop_faq_2_answer: Story content can be played solo with AI companions, but high-difficulty co-op quests require real players and do not support AI fill.
category_coop_faq_3: How does the summon rule work in co-op?
category_coop_faq_3_answer: Each player equips 4 summons, but only 1 can be active at a time per party. Coordinate with teammates to maximize coverage.
category_feature_conflux_html:
DepthDifficultyKey Rewards
1-5Easy-MediumBasic Enhancement Mats
6-10Medium-HardSigils, Weapon Traits
11-15HardRare Sigils, Transcendence Mats
16-20Very HardBest-in-slot Sigils, Slot EX Unlocks
category_conflux_overview: The Conflux is a new roguelite solo mode introduced in Endless Ragnarok. Players enter through gateways in Seedhollow or Tredame Sanctum and battle through randomized rooms with escalating difficulty. At each depth, you choose power-ups called Resonance bonuses that shape your run. Deeper depths yield rarer materials for Sigils, Weapon Transcendence, and other endgame systems. The mode is the primary source of enhancement materials and rare Sigils.
category_conflux_quicktips_1: Prioritize offensive Resonance bonuses early — faster clears mean more material farming per hour.
category_conflux_quicktips_2: Don't skip healing rooms at deeper depths; a single mistake on Hard+ can end your run.
category_conflux_quicktips_3: The Conflux resets each session — there is no permanent progression loss, so experiment freely with different strategies.
category_conflux_faq_1: Is the Conflux mandatory for progression?
category_conflux_faq_1_answer: The Conflux is the best source of enhancement materials and rare Sigils, making it effectively mandatory for endgame optimization. However, you can progress the story without it.
category_conflux_faq_2: Can I play the Conflux in co-op?
category_conflux_faq_2_answer: No, the Conflux is a solo-only mode. However, materials and rewards earned transfer to co-op content.
category_conflux_faq_3: What are the best characters for the Conflux?
category_conflux_faq_3_answer: Self-sufficient DPS characters like Sandalphon and Charlotta excel, as you cannot rely on teammates. Check our Conflux character guide for details.
category_feature_endgame_html:
ActivityMaterialsRecommended Power
Fatebreaker QuestsTranscendence MatsLevel 100 + Master Trait
Chaos BossesBest SigilsFully Built Character
Conflux (Depth 16+)Rare Sigils, Slot EXLevel 100 + Good Sigils
category_endgame_overview: The endgame in Endless Ragnarok centers around three core activities: Fatebreaker quests for Weapon Transcendence materials, Chaos-tier boss encounters for the best Sigils, and deep Conflux runs for rare Sigils and Slot EX unlocks. After reaching Level 100 and unlocking Master Traits, players optimize their builds through these farming routes. Efficient endgame progression requires a rotation across all three activities to gather the diverse materials needed for full character optimization.
category_endgame_quicktips_1: Start with Fatebreaker quests to get Weapon Transcendence materials — transcended weapons significantly boost your damage output.
category_endgame_quicktips_2: Rotate between all three endgame activities rather than grinding just one; each provides materials the others don't.
category_endgame_quicktips_3: Use the Conflux for targeted Sigil farming — you can preview available rewards before committing to a depth.
category_endgame_faq_1: What should I do first at endgame?
category_endgame_faq_1_answer: Unlock Master Traits for your main character, then run Fatebreaker quests for Weapon Transcendence. This gives the biggest power spike for the least investment.
category_endgame_faq_2: How long does full endgame optimization take?
category_endgame_faq_2_answer: Expect 40-80 hours of farming to fully optimize a single character with best-in-slot Sigils, maxed Master Trait, and transcended weapon.
category_endgame_faq_3_answer: Fatebreaker quests are the primary source of Weapon Transcendence materials, which are essential for endgame power. Skipping them will leave your weapons significantly underpowered.
category_feature_mastertraits_html:
StyleFocusBest For
InsightBalanced / UtilityHybrid characters, flexible content
EssenceSupport / BuffsBuffers, healers, co-op
CruxPure DPS / DamageNukers, solo content, burst
category_mastertraits_overview: Master Traits are the flagship progression system in Endless Ragnarok, unlocked at Level 100 for all 28 characters. Each character chooses one of three Master Trait Styles — Insight, Essence, or Crux — that fundamentally changes how their skills work. Insight provides balanced utility, Essence specializes in support and buffs, while Crux maximizes damage output. The choice is not permanent, but respeccing costs Resonance points, so understanding each path before committing is important.
category_mastertraits_quicktips_1: You can switch Master Trait styles, but it costs Resonance points — plan your choice based on your main content focus.
category_mastertraits_quicktips_2: Crux is generally the best choice for DPS-focused characters in solo content, while Essence excels in co-op support roles.
category_mastertraits_quicktips_3: Level 100 unlocks all three paths simultaneously — you just need to choose which one to activate.
category_mastertraits_faq_1: Can I change my Master Trait later?
category_mastertraits_faq_1_answer: Yes, you can switch between the three styles at any time, but each switch costs Resonance points. Plan your choice to minimize wasted resources.
category_mastertraits_faq_2: Do Master Traits stack with base skills?
category_mastertraits_faq_2_answer: Master Traits modify and enhance your existing skills rather than replacing them. They add new effects, increase damage, or change skill behavior.
category_mastertraits_faq_3: Which Master Trait is best for each character?
category_mastertraits_faq_3_answer: It depends on your build goal. Check our Best Master Trait Paths guide for per-character recommendations based on DPS, support, and hybrid roles.
category_feature_sigils_html:
TierSourceNotable Examples

BConflux Depth 5+ / CraftingStalwart Defense, Mana Efficiency
category_sigils_overview: Sigils are passive enhancement items that define character builds in Endless Ragnarok. The expansion adds new high-tier Sigils obtainable through the Conflux, Chaos-tier bosses, and Fatebreaker quests. Each character can equip multiple Sigils, and the right combination dramatically impacts performance. Sigil farming through the Conflux is the most reliable path to best-in-slot enhancements, with deeper depths yielding rarer and more powerful options.
category_sigils_quicktips_1: Focus on S-tier Sigils for your main character first — the power difference between S and A tier is significant.
category_sigils_quicktips_2: Don't neglect defensive Sigils in Chaos content; a dead character deals zero damage.
category_sigils_quicktips_3: Craft lower-tier Sigils while farming for upgrades — they provide incremental power until you find best-in-slot drops.
category_sigils_faq_1: Where is the best place to farm Sigils?
category_sigils_faq_1_answer: The Conflux at Depth 16+ and Chaos-tier boss quests are the primary sources of S-tier Sigils. Both methods are time-intensive but reliable.
category_sigils_faq_2_answer: Some Sigils can be enhanced through crafting with Conflux materials. Higher enhancement levels improve the Sigil's base stats and can unlock secondary effects.
category_sigils_faq_3: How many Sigils can a character equip?
category_sigils_faq_3_answer: Each character has multiple Sigil slots that unlock as you progress. The exact number varies but generally allows 4-6 equipped Sigils per character.
category_feature_storywalkthrough_html:
ChapterFocusKey Event
PrologueUnlocking the ExpansionTale of Bahamut's Rage
Ch 1-3New Threat EmergesRagnalia's Arrival
Ch 4-6The HeraldsBeelzebub Confrontation
Ch 7+Final BattleThe World Encounter
category_storywalkthrough_overview: The Endless Ragnarok story continues the Granblue Fantasy: Relink narrative with a new arc featuring the mysterious Ragnalia, the Herald of Doom Beelzebub, and the entity known as The World. The expansion adds hours of story content with full voice acting, new cutscenes, and multiple side quests including Fate Episodes for each new character. Our walkthrough covers every chapter, boss encounter, and key decision point to ensure you don't miss any content.
category_storywalkthrough_quicktips_1: Complete the prerequisite quest 'The Tale of Bahamut's Rage' before starting the expansion — it's required to unlock the Epilogue.
category_storywalkthrough_quicktips_2: Don't skip Fate Episodes for new characters — they provide lore context and unlock additional abilities.
category_storywalkthrough_quicktips_3: Story bosses scale with your level, so you don't need to grind before progressing the narrative.
category_storywalkthrough_faq_1: How long is the Endless Ragnarok story?
category_storywalkthrough_faq_1_answer: The main story takes approximately 15-20 hours. Including all side quests and Fate Episodes, expect 25-35 hours of story content.
category_storywalkthrough_faq_2: Can I play the expansion without finishing the base game?
category_storywalkthrough_faq_2_answer: You must complete the Proud Quest 'The Tale of Bahamut's Rage' and reach the Epilogue to start the Endless Ragnarok content.
category_storywalkthrough_faq_3_answer: The main story has a single ending, but Fate Episodes and side quests provide additional character-specific storylines and lore.
category_feature_summons_html:
TypeExamplesKey Feature
ControllableLucilius, RolanDirect attack control + Primal Burst
Passive BuffVarious Primal BeastsStat boosts, elemental bonuses
Primal BurstAll controllableMassive AoE damage at full gauge
category_summons_overview: The Summon System in Endless Ragnarok allows Lyria to call upon powerful primal beasts during combat. Two summons — Lucilius and Rolan — are fully controllable, letting players direct their attacks and trigger devastating Primal Burst combos. Other summons provide passive buffs such as stat boosts and elemental bonuses. Each player equips up to 4 summons, but only 1 can be fielded at a time per party, making selection and timing crucial for maximizing damage output.
category_summons_quicktips_1: Controllable summons deal far more damage than passive ones — prioritize Lucilius and Rolan for your summon slots.
category_summons_quicktips_2: Save your Primal Burst for boss phase transitions or DPS check windows for maximum impact.
category_summons_quicktips_3: In co-op, coordinate summon timing with your team — overlapping summons wastes gauge potential.
category_summons_faq_1: How do I unlock controllable summons?
category_summons_faq_1_answer: Lucilius and Rolan unlock through story progression in the Endless Ragnarok expansion. Complete their respective quest chains to gain access.
category_summons_faq_2_answer: Primal Burst is a powerful AoE attack triggered when a controllable summon's gauge is fully charged. It deals massive damage and can break boss guards.
category_summons_faq_3_answer: No, summons are set before the quest begins. Plan your summon loadout based on the content and your character's build.
category_feature_tierlist_html:
TierCharactersPerformance
SSSandalphon, CagliostroDominant in all content
SCharlotta, Narmaya, BeatrixExcellent in most scenarios
AMaglielle, Eustace, VaseragaStrong with right builds
category_tierlist_overview: Our Endless Ragnarok tier list ranks all 28 playable characters based on damage output, utility, survivability, and performance in Chaos-tier content. Rankings account for Master Trait builds, optimal Sigil loadouts, and Weapon Transcendence. The tier list is updated after each major patch and balance change, with weekly adjustments based on community feedback and in-game testing data.
category_tierlist_quicktips_1: Tier lists reflect general performance — lower-tier characters can excel with the right build and in specific content niches.
category_tierlist_quicktips_2: Master Traits can shift a character's tier placement significantly — always check the latest rankings after unlocking new traits.
category_tierlist_quicktips_3: Co-op utility and solo DPS are weighted differently — a character may be SS in co-op but A-tier solo, or vice versa.
category_tierlist_faq_1: How is the tier list created?
category_tierlist_faq_1_answer: We evaluate characters across damage output, utility, survivability, and Chaos-tier performance. Testing uses fully built characters with optimized Sigils and Master Traits.
category_tierlist_faq_2: How often is the tier list updated?
category_tierlist_faq_2_answer: Major updates follow every patch. Minor adjustments are made weekly based on community data and new strategy discoveries.
category_tierlist_faq_3: Should I only play SS and S tier characters?
category_tierlist_faq_3_answer: Not at all. A-tier and below characters are viable in most content with proper builds. Play what you enjoy and optimize around it.
category_feature_weapontranscendence_htm:
StageUnlockCost
1-5Swappable TraitsConflux Materials
6-9Enhanced StatsFatebreaker Materials
10Slot EX + Aesthetic EffectsRare Boss Drops
category_weapontranscendence_overview: Weapon Transcendence allows you to upgrade fully enhanced weapons beyond their original limits. Starting at Transcendence Level 1, weapons gain swappable traits that let you customize their effects. At higher levels, weapons receive significant stat boosts. Reaching Transcendence Level 10 unlocks Slot EX rewards and special aesthetic effects. Materials come primarily from Fatebreaker quests and the Conflux, making endgame farming essential for weapon optimization.
category_weapontranscendence_quicktips_1: Only fully enhanced (max level) weapons can undergo Transcendence — max your weapon's base level first.
category_weapontranscendence_quicktips_2: Swappable traits are the biggest early upgrade — they let you change a weapon's element or skill effect without crafting a new weapon.
category_weapontranscendence_quicktips_3: Farming Fatebreaker quests is the most efficient path to mid-level Transcendence materials.
category_weapontranscendence_faq_1: Which weapons should I transcend first?
category_weapontranscendence_faq_1_answe: Prioritize your main character's best-in-slot weapon. The damage increase from Transcendence is significant and compounds with Master Trait and Sigil bonuses.
category_weapontranscendence_faq_2: Can I change a transcended weapon's traits?
category_weapontranscendence_faq_2_answe: Yes, swappable traits can be changed freely once unlocked. This is one of the main benefits of Transcendence — weapon customization without recrafting.
category_weapontranscendence_faq_3_answe: Slot EX is a special equipment slot unlocked at Transcendence Level 10. It provides powerful additional stat bonuses and is unique to transcended weapons.
